subcodes.first_line: The Book speaketh with the tongue of revelation at the Most Great Vista, this station round which circle the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نطق به لسان الوحی فی المنظر الاکبر هذا المقام الذی یطوفه الملا الاعلی و
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action, @the concourse on high
